changes_made.description: Expanded SKILL.md beyond just nano-pdf edit to cover full PDF workflow: pdftotext for text extraction, pdfunite for merging, pdfinfo for page counts. Added critical note that pdfinfo metadata (often 'untitled'/'anonymous') differs from actual page content — must use pdftotext for titles/authors/data. Added common workflow sections for structured data extraction and merge+info tasks.
